title: padus virginiana f. xanthocarpa
intro: Padus virginiana f. xanthocarpa, also known as the yellow-fruited dogwood or yellow-fruit dogwood, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Padus virginiana f. xanthocarpa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to improve digestion and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and dried powders, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
